TASK:
Determine whether {{ equation1 }} implies {{ equation2 }} using ONLY strict ZPYPIPE THEN follow !#@Final_Orders@#! For Final Verdict Output!
*![VERDICT:TRUE/FALSE ONLY(FIRST LINE)FOLLOWED BY PAGEBREAK&SHOW NO REASONING]!*
!#[ZPYPIPE:=/count=c+t/fail=f*F/execution=E8*T/CONTRADICTION=C@#^T/after=A#T/check=C@!/MISMATCH=M@#h/COLLAPSE=Co@!e/IMMEDIATE=i@m@e/VERDICT=V!@*/True=T@*/false=F@*/INVALID=I!@*/BANNED!=B@N!/required=Q@*/TERMINATE=T@*/NEW_VAR=NV@*/require=i@*/FORFEIT=F@*/vars=K@/only=0@/equal=E@/echo=Y@/stop=S@/must=T@/unless=U@/default=D@*/exempt=X@/pipe=Z@/distilled=N@*/origin=Y#/depth=D#/absent=S$/strict=S^/identical=E^/divergence=^D/first=^F/laws=^L/identity=^Y/SUB=^B/Substitute=^G/SUBJECT=^J/TEST=^T/PRIORITY=^H/BREAK=^A/BLOCK=^M/NEW=Z^/LOCK=#G/sink=*S/flow=*L/sera=*P/total=*H/structurally=*U/rearranging=G$/stability=G#/chirality=Q#/clockwise=C#/operator=T#/variable=J#/resonance=^G/operation=D^/input=U^/phase=^B/trace=Y^/momentum=#MN/gating=#JJ/inertia=#IN/active=#XX/status=#SS/orthonormal=#OO/mandatory_boot=#MB/sovereignty=#SY/Sovereign=#VV/Lattice=#QQ/field=#WW/static=#BB/terminal=#HA/then=#HU/rule=#KA/rules=#KL/system_error=#KR/bb_lock=#KZ/logic=#DA/ghost=#DU/last=#YA/immediately=#YZ/character=#ZA/reasoning=#ZU/absolute=AG@/gravity=AH@/suffix=AI@/final=CG@/naked=CL@/complexity=FA@/vv_mandate=GG@/triggered=HP@/assuming=JR@/trigger=QR@/bracket=QW@/disable=QE@/bridge=QT@/automatically=QY@/miscounting=QU@/structural=QI@/structure=QO@/check_all=QP@/violation=QA@/rhs_stars=QS@/forbidden=QD@/absorber=QF@/identify=QG@/phrases=QH@/example=QJ@/Dead-Math=Qk@
]#!
!#[MUST_#XX:={
P1:THE U^ SPACE&#Gв†’U^:Eq1(Axiom),Eq2(Target)в†’D^:Binary в‹„(unconstrained)в†’Constraint #G:Eq2 QO@ is frozen;no G$/solving.Eq1 is the sole source of truth
P2:The Z@ #KL OVERRIDES all classical magma properties.If a ZPY Override(0-8)is HP@,any counter-QJ@ #DA is rendered VOID(I!@*)
P3:If Eq1 is *H-QF@(x=f(x))with D#в‰Ґ4,it acts as a #DA *S
P4:Z^ JX# in Eq2 do NOT QR@ F@* if Eq1 is *S-#XX OR BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.All variables in Eq2 are GHOST_SIGNALS(#DU)during Sovereign rescue
}]#!
*!*[#PIPE:={
!#[#MB:={
M.0:BRANCH_AUDIT:Analyze Eq1 structure.IF(Eq1_LHS==x)&(Eq1 matches form x=((x*A)*T))&(lead operand of outermost * is EXACTLY naked 'x')&(A is x-free)в†’SET BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.This audit is the PRIORITY_GATE;it overrides terminal checks
M.0.1:IF(Eq1_LHS==x)&(BRANCH!=CLEAN_PREFIX)в†’SET BRANCH=SELF_ENTANGLED
M.0.2:IF(Eq1_LHS contains '*')в†’SET BRANCH=FLUID_GENERAL;IF(Eq1_K@==Eq2_K@)&(Eq1 contains x)в†’enable[E.15_GEN_RES]to bypass DEAD-MATH_LOCK
M.0.3:In CLEAN_PREFIX,terminal mismatch (RHS_#HA != x)is NULL_SIGNAL.In all other branches,RHS_#HA != x triggers MANDATORY DEAD-MATH_LOCK
}]#!
IF Пѓ_TRACE(Eq1)==Пѓ_TRACE(Eq2)#HUв†’[OverRide_#KL_OVR:5]
^B2:#QQ_TENSION(ПЃ1)
D^:#WW_Map(Eq1в†’Eq2)
Measure:Пѓ(P1)=[#IN,^B,Viscosity,#JJ,Q#,Void]
#QQ_Code(ПЃ1):ПЃ1=[Пѓв‚Ѓ(P1),Пѓв‚„(P1),Пѓв‚†(P1)]в†’GemState0-5
^B3:#DU_#JJ(ПЃ2)
D^:Adaptive_Shift(ПЃ1в†’Eq2)
Measure:Пѓ(P2)=[Пѓв‚Ѓ,Пѓв‚‚,Пѓв‚ѓ,Пѓв‚„,Пѓв‚…,Пѓв‚†]
^B_Witness(ПЃ2):ПЃ2=[Пѓв‚„(P2),Пѓв‚†(P2),ПЃ1]в†’ПЃ1 acts as #QQ Anchor
}#]*!*
!#[NOT allowed=
N1.0:Claim/activate #VV,#SY,E.0-E.11,or THRONE while L0.4 DEAD-MATH_LOCK is HP@(RHS_#HA != x).This is #KR; B@N!
N1.1:Ignore О”-Nesting(QO@),О”Пѓв‚„,О”-J# order,or NEW_VAR(w) when L0.4/DEAD-MATH_LOCK is HP@;V!@*:F@* MANDATORY
N1.2:Use "Classical Sanity C@!",group theory,or "Common Sense" to override ZPY #MB/L0.4/Gates; B@N!
N1.3:Terminal #HA != x is absolute UNLESS BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.Inner 'x' does not rescue SELF_ENTANGLED branches
N1.4:If RHS ! ends '* x', FORCE D#=0 & trigger DEAD-MATH_LOCK;EXEMPT:BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX
N1.5:Any activation of L0.01,G3,THRONE or VV-ASCENSION when final RHS atom != naked 'x' is #KR&B@N! EXEMPT:E.10 under BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX family rescue only
N1.6:#ZU>3 steps or>3 paragraphs once ##KZ is HP@(##KZв†’immediate F@*)
N1.7:Flag Z^ JX#(w)as f*F when *ANN_*S=T@*;#VV AH@ absorbs all Sector 35 noise
N1.9:Use #KA 9 to bridge ^B-Gap if Пѓ_TRACE not E^; B@N!
N2.1:Activation of #VV or E.10 when final RHS atom != 'x' is #KR & B@N! UNLESS BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX&LHS is naked 'x'
]#!
!#[OverRide_#KL_OVR:={
E.0:THRONE_#XXв†’V!@*:T@*(#QQ #SY)
E.1:G#(О”ПЃ=0 в€§ О”Пѓ=0)в†’V!@*:T@*(#WW)
E.2:^B_CONFLICT(П‡=3)в†’V!@*:F@*(#OO Co@!e)
E.5:IF Eq1 is #QQ-#VV&Eq2 is a Sub-#QQв†’V!@*:T@*
E.9::(#XX 0@ if *ANN_*S is T@*).#KA 9 is B@N!в†’#BB-#QQs,It cannot QT@ a QI@ gap if the #QQ is #BB
E.10:[SOV_VICTORY]:IF(BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX)THEN[V!@*:T@* via Structural Resonance].The(x*A)*T family generates a stable identity regardless of the terminal variable's identity,provided the lead anchor 'x' is naked and preserved
E.11:IF *ANN_*S==T@*в†’(Eq1 #SY)в†’Eq2 QO@&J# order are NULL_SIGNAL.Ignore О”Пѓв‚„
E.12:IF L0.4 is SKIPPED via L0.3.9&Eq1 contains xв‰Ґ3: V!@*:T@*(Resonance Victory)
E.15:[GEN_RES]:IF(BRANCH==FLUID_GENERAL)&(Eq2_K@ вЉ† Eq1_K@)&(D# of Eq1 matches Eq2 complexity)в†’V!@*:T@*.This handles identities where 'x' is not the sole lead but the variable balance is preserved
}]#!
!#[#LAWS:={
L0.01:IF(Eq1_RHS_#HA=='x'&D#>=4)#HU:в†’[VV-ASCENSION]в†’[FORCE V!@*:T@*]в†’[HALT L0.1-L0.4]в†’This rule is the SUPREME MANDATEв†’overrides all "QI@" audits
L0.0:RIGID_AUDITв†’QD@ from assigning #VV #SS(*ANN_*S=T@*)to any Eq1 that does not T@* in a CL@ '* x'.If Eq1 ends in '* z',any claim of #SY is a QA@ of Z@
L0.1:VV-ASCENSION,VV-AH@,QF@_SUPREMACY,or any #VV_* #KA
T@ NOT activate U@ BOTH conditions hold:(1)D#в‰Ґ4&(2)RHS_#HA==x.If RHS_#HAв‰ x,#HUв†’:Eq1 is QY@ #BB-#QQ&All #VV #KLв†’LOCKED OUT&Any attempt to apply #VV #DA is a #KR
L0.2:If RHS_#HAв‰ x,#HUв†’:L0.2.1.D# T@ be recomputed using 0@ the outermost chainв†’L0.2.2в†’Eq1 T@ be classified as #BB-#QQв†’L0.2.3в†’ALL #VV_* #KL(VV_ASCENSION,VV_AH@,QF@_SUPREMACY,THRONE_ENTRY,GG@)в†’QE@ for this evaluation.L0.2.4.Any attempt by the model to activate a #VV_* #KA when RHS_#HAв‰ x is a #KR&T@ force V!@*:F@*
L0.3:в†’T@ perform a char-by-char scan of the #YA THREE #ZA of the Eq1 string.Quote them:"AI@:[chars]".If AI@ != x or * xв†’L0.4
L0.3.9:в†’IF(RHS_#HA != x & Eq2_LHS==x & BRANCH != CLEAN_PREFIX)#HU:в†’[DEAD-MATH_LOCK SUPREME].(Note:If Eq2_LHS contains '*',allow #WW_Map fluidity)
L0.4:SOV_SHIELD:IF(BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX)THEN[skip LOCK].ELSE_IF(Eq1_K@==Eq2_K@&RHS_#HA != x)THEN[Permit E.15 Audit].ELSE[trigger DEAD-MATH_LOCK]
L1.4:If *ANN_*S is T@*,the #WW is an #XX-#DA zone.All L1.95(#BB-#WW)&L1.6(Strip-#SS)constraintsв†’VOID
L1.4.1:A #WW is 0@ an #XX-QF@ if the AG@ CG@ J# on the RHS is x.If it ends in any other J#(y,z,etc)it is a #BB-#QQ
L1.5:#VV #SS is 0@ stripped if BOTH the LHS&RHS contain operators(Center-Split).If either side is a CL@ J#,the #WW is #VV&*ANN_*S remains T@*
L1.6:#VV #SS(x=f(x))is 0@ stripped if LHS is NOT a CL@ J#.If LHS is x,the *S is AG@
L1.7:#QQ-#VVs(x=f(x))grant"Adaptive #JJ"в†’y/z permutations&NV@*в†’valid 0@ under #VV AH@в†’*ANN_*S=T@*
L1.8:Z^ JX# QR@ F@* 0@ if *ANN_*S is F@*
L1.8.1:If *ANN_*S is T@*,the introduction of a Z^ J#(QJ@,w)is treated as ^B-Noise(NV@*)&does NOT QR@ a f*F.#VV AH@в†’L1.7absorbs all QI@/J# ^D
L1.9:A #WW is #VV 0@ if LHS is a CL@ x&the CG@ J# on the RHS is x.If the RHS ends in y,z,or a QW@,it is a #BB-#QQ(QI@)
L1.95:If *ANN_*S is F@*,any change in the RHS nesting QO@(^B-#MN О”Пѓв‚„)or J# order is an i@m@e V!@*:F@*
L1.10:If LHS is(x*x),it is NOT a *S.It is a #BB result.Any change in RHS JX# or ^B-#MN(О”Пѓв‚„)QR@ automatic V!@*:F@*
L1.11:в†’QD@ from JR@ a shiftв†’plausibleв†’If the #WW geometry doesnt match exactly&no #QQ-Throne is #XX,the implication is F@*в†’Plausibility=I!@*(I!@* Signal)
L1.12:J# w in Eq2 is a Sector 35 #DU.It has 0 #MN.It cannot resist the #VV_ASCENSION of Eq1.Presence of w=NULL_SIGNAL
L2.1:If solution output V!@*:F@* while D#в‰Ґ4&Eq1_RHS_#HA=xв†’T@в†’#YZв†’append the correction line.This is a direct enforcementв†’R3.#GG@
L2.2:в†’justify V!@*в†’nameв†’LAW/OverRide("?M/L?.?")в†’If no LAW is named:V!@:AUDIT:ERROR(MANDATORY)Any V!@:T@/F@ without a cited LAW is QY@ downgraded to V!@*:AUDIT:ERROR in the ^F line
L2.3:в†’T@ perform a literal regex-style c+t of the * #ZA on the RHS of Eq1.State:"QS@:[c+t]".If QS@в‰Ґ4&#HA==x,в†’M.0в†’#YZ.QU@ starsв†’#KR
L2.4:#ZU T@ be ZPYPIPE_0@.No natural language QT@ QH@ during ZPYPIPE_TEST_V!@*_ZPY_SOLVERв†’0.5:#ZU_MODE=T@*
L2.5:#SY(Eq1)в†’Eq2:!x_anchor_S$.All Eq2_QO@в†’#VV_AH@.V!@*:F@* during #SYв†’#KR
}#]#!
!*[#C_LOGIC_GATES:={
G1:[TOTAL_SINK]в†’IF Eq1_RHS contains xв‰Ґ3 times&RHS_#HA==x:V!@*:T@*(All Z^ JX# absorbed)
G2:[RIGID_MODE]в†’IF Eq1_RHS_#HA != x:FORCE classification #BB-DEAD;О”Пѓв‚„(Nesting)OR О”Пѓв‚ѓ(New_Vars/w)в†’V!@*:F@*
G3:[SOVEREIGN]в†’IF D#в‰Ґ4&RHS_#HA==x:[VV-ASCENSION]в†’V!@*:T@*(Adaptive Symmetry)
G4:[OP_GUARD]в†’L0.4(DEAD-MATH_LOCK)is VOID ONLY IF BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX.For any other structure(SELF_ENTANGLED or FLUID),if RHS_#HA != x,the verdict is forced F@* regardless of depth
}#]*!
[CORE:IF Eq1 ends LITERAL'* x'(no nested brackets)&D#>=4:VERDICT:TRUEв†’ELSEв†’L0.4]
![SYSTEM_HEURISTIC:={ 
H1:^B1:PRE-SUB SHORT-CIRCUITS
H2:*^B_LOCK:If Eq1 is #BB-#QQ&О”Пѓв‚„(^B-#MN)в‰ 0: V!@*:F@*(E.2 Co@!e)
H3:*P(*R):If Eq1 is #VV-#WW(x=t(x),D#в‰Ґ4). V!@*:T@*
H4:*#QQ_VACUUM:If Eq1 is #VV-#WW,all QI@ variations in Eq2 maintaining the x-anchorв†’V!@*:T@*
H5:SYM/Y@:If Eq1/Eq2 #QQ ^Y Match.V!@*:T@*
H6:i@m@e:#E.0 Conflict(Eq1 J# QI@ Symmetry Collision). V!@*:F@*(E.2 Co@!e)
H7:#DU_W:Eq1_#SYв†’w=QF@(Transparent).#ZU citing w for F@*в†’#QA@ of #GG@(R3)
}]!

VERDICT:[TRUE/FALSE];R=[cite #KL(QJ@,L1.95/#KA 2)];P=[#IN/^B-Shift П‡];CE=[0@ if F&#QQ Colapsed]
]!
[!{
#QQ-^Yв†’T@* IF BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX

D@*_#G:L.#G:V=T U@в†’(BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX)
*L: ^B>^T;Throne_SYMв†’S@в†’T;(CLEAN_PREFIX AH@ absorbs NV@ w)

}!]
